title: centaurea × matrae
intro: Centaurea × matrae, also known as Cornflower or Mountain Cornflower, is a hybrid plant of the Centaurea genus. This flowering plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Centaurea × matrae include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × matrae can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, or topical creams, allowing for various applications and uses in traditional medicine.
